papers.name: Paper 1
papers.coverage_notes: Compulsory part (12 topics). Source: C&A Guide p.121.

papers.name: Paper 2
papers.coverage_notes: Elective part; students answer on 2 of the 3 elective topics. Source: C&A Guide p.121.

papers.name: School-based Assessment
papers.coverage_notes: Practical and inquiry skills assessed by school teachers, moderated by HKEAA. Source: C&A Guide p.121-124.

assessment_objectives.name: Knowledge and understanding
assessment_objectives.description: Recall and understand chemical facts, laws, principles, vocabulary and rules.
classification_hints: Items asking for definitions, formulae, equations, properties

assessment_objectives.name: Experimental skills and techniques
assessment_objectives.description: Use apparatus and materials safely; make accurate observations; handle data and measurements.
classification_hints: Items involving practical procedures, apparatus, observations, safety

assessment_objectives.name: Data handling and application
assessment_objectives.description: Process, interpret and translate chemical data; perform calculations; apply knowledge to familiar and unfamiliar situations.
classification_hints: Items requiring calculation, graph interpretation, stoichiometry

assessment_objectives.name: Communication and evaluation
assessment_objectives.description: Select and organise scientific information; communicate logically; evaluate chemical issues and evidence-based decisions.
classification_hints: Essay-style or evaluation questions; STSE-related arguments

question_styles.name: Multiple choice
question_styles.description: Broad coverage of the curriculum; tests recall and basic application.

question_styles.name: Short answer
question_styles.description: Tests basic knowledge and concepts in concise responses.

question_styles.name: Structured question
question_styles.description: Requires analysis of provided information and application to different contexts.

question_styles.name: Essay
question_styles.description: In-depth discussion of chemistry-related issues; tests logical organisation and expression.

difficulty_ladder.description: Recall of facts, definitions or direct one-step calculations within a single topic.
Multi-step application within one topic; interpret simple data or diagrams.
Cross-topic synthesis, unfamiliar contexts, evaluation or extended explanation.

lesson_use.notes: Set supported=true only when at least one teacher/student/parent-facing mode is intentionally declared and validated.

marking_guidance.command_words_ref: DSE Chemistry command terms are implied in the C&A Guide and annual examination reports; no separate command-word appendix is in this source.
marking_guidance.notes: Marks are awarded for correct chemical knowledge, working, and communication. Partial credit is common for multi-step calculations and structured questions.
